title: DENTAL CLINIC - 211info
text: SANDY HEALTH CENTER DENTAL CLINIC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides general dentistry services, including emergency care, cleaning, sealants, fluoride treatments and supplements, information on proper care, consultation, and referrals. 39740 Pleasant Street Sandy, OR 97055 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday/Tuesday/Friday 8am-5pm, Wednesday 10am-7pm (503) 655-8471 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 655-8471 Primary Care INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to schedule an appointment FEES: Accepts the following insurance plans for comprehensive care: OpenCard, CareOregon Dental, ODS Dental-Unassigned. Also offers sliding scale fees based on household income and size. A minimum of $40 is required at time of visit and will be applied to the bill. Accepts uninsured patients for urgent services. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable LANGUAGES: English, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Clackamas County SITE HOURS: Monday/Tuesday/Friday 8am-5pm, Wednesday-Thursday 8am-7pm Services: Cavity Prevention Measures Dental Hygiene Emergency Dental Care Pediatric Dentistry Other Services Offered At This Location: HUMAN REPRODUCTION - OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - CHILD AND ADOLESCENT MENTAL HEALTH SERVICES MENTAL HEALTH CARE FACILITIES - ADULT MENTAL HEALTH SERVICES OUTPATIENT HEALTH FACILITIES - PRIMARY CARE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. SANDY HEALTH CENTER
